'''thazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cuntwardly|cuntwardly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cuntwardly|cuntwardly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thazate|thazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thazatesher|thazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazatesherĂ«m|thazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazatero|thazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazateshĂ«|thazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazateshĂ«m|thazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazatero|gokithazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazateshĂ«|gokithazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazateshĂ«m|gokithazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothazankerom|gothazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazankeshĂ«|gothazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazankeshĂ«m|gothazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothazankeya|gothazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazaterom|thazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazatemu|thazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thazateya|thazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazaterom|gokithazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazatemu|gokithazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithazateya|gokithazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thazazate|thazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thazazatesher|thazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazazatesherĂ«m|thazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazazatero|thazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thazazateshĂ«|thazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazazateshĂ«m|thazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazazatero|gokithazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithazazateshĂ«|gokithazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazazateshĂ«m|gokithazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothazazankerom|gothazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothazazankeshĂ«|gothazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothazazankeshĂ«m|gothazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothazazankeya|gothazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thazazaterom|thazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thazazatemu|thazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thazazateya|thazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithazazaterom|gokithazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithazazatemu|gokithazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithazazateya|gokithazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠte|thĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠtesher|thĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠtero|thĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠtero|gokithĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠterom|thĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠtemu|thĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠzĂŠteya|thĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠterom|gokithĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠzĂŠteya|gokithĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafzafte|thafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafzaftesher|thafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzaftesherĂ«m|thafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafzaftero|thafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafzafteshĂ«|thafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzafteshĂ«m|thafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafzaftero|gokithafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafzafteshĂ«|gokithafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafzafteshĂ«m|gokithafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafzafnkerom|gothafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafzafnkeshĂ«|gothafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafzafnkeshĂ«m|gothafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafzafnkeya|gothafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafzafterom|thafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafzaftemu|thafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafzafteya|thafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafzafterom|gokithafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafzaftemu|gokithafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafzafteya|gokithafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
